pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to support the 'release' flag and Java 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.1) do not support the <release> configuration option required for cross-compilation or targeting Java 9+ modules cleanly, or may lack full Java 11 support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The <source> and <target> flags are deprecated for Java 9+ in favor of <release> which also sets the bootstrap classpath; using source/target with Java 11 can lead to API leakage or compilation errors against newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (like 0.7.1) do not support instrumenting classes compiled for Java 11, causing runtime errors during test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace removed javax.inject from JDK/standard libraries.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject was removed from the standard Java EE APIs in Java 11 (and earlier in Java 9+ if not explicitly provided), causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime if code depends on it.
